facebook.caption:
Tourists walk past this place every single day on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Their loss.

Rajwadi Zaikah Indian Restaurant is pulling a 4.7★ from 229 reviews and the expat crowd already knows. Proper curries, real spice levels, zero resort markup. On an island where seafood gets repetitive fast, this is the reset button your stomach needs.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Butter chicken in Phu Quoc. 4.7 stars. 229 people vouching. Walk into Rajwadi Zaikah on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and order like you mean it.
